escalation.rationale: Israeli drone strikes kill 17 in Lebanon violating April ceasefire, while US-Iran peace talks advance with 14-point proposal under Pakistani mediation.

ticker_items: Israeli strikes kill 17 in Lebanon, violating April ceasefire
Iran reviewing US 14-point peace proposal via Pakistan mediation
Putin holds downsized Victory Day parade without heavy weapons
US forces clear defended path through Strait of Hormuz

new_entrant.text: North Korean troops participated in Russia's Victory Day parade for the first time.

middle_east.description: US forces disabled two Iranian oil tankers after exchanging fire in the Strait of Hormuz.
Iranian missile and drone attack reported on UAE territory.
Hezbollah conducted 13 targeted military operations against Israeli forces in southern Lebanon.
Drone hits cargo ship off Qatar's coast amid US-Iran ceasefire strain.
Kuwait repels drone attacks as Gulf tensions persist.
United Arab Emirates repels drone attacks amid regional tensions.
Israeli drone strikes on vehicles killed 4 people.
Israeli airstrikes killed at least 13 people.

claimed_totals.claim: North Korean soldiers sent to Russia

claimed_totals.figure: 3,468 dead in Iran, 2,702 dead in Lebanon, 28 killed in Gulf states

russia.text: I think the conflict with Ukraine is coming to an end, but I would meet President Zelensky only once a final peace deal has been agreed.
russia.speaker: Vladimir Putin
russia.title: Russian President

russia.text: Russia fighting for just cause in Ukraine
russia.speaker: Vladimir Putin
russia.title: President

russia.text: Ukraine conflict coming to an end
russia.speaker: Vladimir Putin
russia.title: President

middle_east.text: Washington may escalate its military posture in the Strait of Hormuz if a deal with Iran is not finalized
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

middle_east.text: I expect an answer from Tehran to the latest US peace proposal within the next few hours.
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

middle_east.text: US will not allow Iran to reach enriched uranium and will blow up anyone who gets near it
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

middle_east.text: Israel cannot deter Palestinian resistance through assassinations
middle_east.speaker: Hezbollah statement
middle_east.title: Official statement

observers.description: Kim Jong Un called ties with Russia top priority in Victory Day message. Estimated 11,000 North Korean soldiers fought for Russia with significant casualties. North Korea pledged continued commitment to mutual defense pact with Russia.

Pakistan is mediating US-Iran peace talks with officials signaling a deal expected 'sooner rather than later'. Iran is reviewing a US 14-point peace proposal that includes uranium enrichment ban and reopening Strait of Hormuz.

Bahrain arrested 41 people over alleged links to Iran's Revolutionary Guards amid heightened regional tensions. The interior ministry said security forces dismantled an organization with suspected Iranian connections.
British Royal Navy destroyer deployed to Middle East for freedom of navigation mission in Strait of Hormuz. UK joining multi-country effort to unlock commercial shipping.

financial.notes: Global oil prices dropped following reports of US-Iran peace proposal progress and potential deal expectations.

update_log.text: Israeli drone and air strikes kill 17 in Lebanon, violating April ceasefire agreement
Iran reviewing US 14-point peace proposal including 10-year uranium enrichment ban
Trump announces three-day Russia-Ukraine ceasefire in effect
Putin presides over scaled-back Victory Day parade with North Korean troops
Gulf states report drone attacks despite US-Iran ceasefire talks.
Russia holds shortest Victory Day parade in modern history without heavy weapons.
Three-day Ukraine ceasefire continues to hold as Putin attends scaled-back parade.
Iran reviewing US 14-point peace proposal including uranium enrichment ban.
Russia holds scaled-back Victory Day parade as Ukraine ceasefire takes effect
US disables two Iranian tankers in Strait of Hormuz amid peace talks
Iran reportedly reviewing 14-point US peace proposal with Pakistan mediation
Hezbollah launches 13 strikes on Israeli forces in southern Lebanon
